session_settings_t(3) Library Functions Manual session_settings_t(3)

NAME

session_settings_t - Session settings for transmission between peers.

SYNOPSIS

#include <src/common/session/settings.h>

Data Fields


uint32_t version
Settings version for conflict detection (monotonically increasing). int16_t width
Terminal width in characters (0 = auto-detect). int16_t height
Terminal height in characters (0 = auto-detect). uint8_t color_mode
Color mode (terminal_color_mode_t value). uint8_t render_mode
Render mode (render_mode_t value). uint8_t palette_type
Palette type (palette_type_t value). char palette_custom [32]
Custom palette characters (if palette_type == PALETTE_CUSTOM). uint8_t audio_enabled
Audio enabled flag. uint8_t encryption_required
Encryption required flag. uint8_t reserved [16]
Reserved bytes for future expansion.

Detailed Description

Session settings for transmission between peers.

Contains display and rendering configuration that can be synchronized between session participants. Uses fixed-size fields for deterministic serialization.

Note

Struct is designed for binary serialization with network byte order.

Reserved bytes allow future extension without breaking compatibility.

Definition at line 77 of file settings.h.
